title: eutriana racemosa
intro: Eutriana racemosa is a plant species, commonly known as the "Eutriana tree" or "Padauk tree", belonging to the family Malvaceae. The bark of this tree has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Eutriana racemosa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Eutriana racemosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
